productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women's Adi Montero White Shoe
description: The Adi Montero range of lifestyle fitness shoes from adidas is a great sneaker. Stylish to the T, it makes for an excellent casual wear too. Offering superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish, these shoes can be teamed with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for enhnaced brethability and extended durabilityPatent three rubber overlays across the sides of the upper for added structure to the shoe and signifying the brand's motto of performance, perseverance and achievementSynthetic central lacing for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for snug comfortMesh tongue for greater breathabilityLogo below collarMidsoleBuilt with Adiprene technology to provide ample cushioning and protect the feet from impactEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortLightly cushioned insole for all-day comfortOutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with horizontal flex grooves for added tractionOutsole built with impact guidance system to ensure natural movement of the feetAdiwear outsole for better abrasion resistance and traction when playing hard ground SportsCarbon rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box to protect the forefootShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
